description: A logistics planner for a bulk commodity mine (e.g., iron ore) analyzes the entire supply chain from mine to port to identify bottlenecks.

nodes.task_description: Model the entire logistics chain, including the mine, rail system, and port, with their respective capacities and constraints.

expected_outcome.value: A complete model of the supply chain is built.

nodes.task_description: Run a simulation of the model to see how the different components interact.

expected_outcome.value: The simulation shows that the rail system has sufficient capacity, but the ship loader at the port is the bottleneck.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a project to upgrade the ship loader to increase its capacity and debottleneck the entire system.

expected_outcome.value: A capital project proposal is created to address the system's main constraint.
